mapper.select: WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT cr.collected_at, cr.checkpoints_timed, cr.checkpoints_req, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_timed - LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_timed, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_req - LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_req FROM checkpoint_raw cr WHERE cr.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND cr.collected_at >= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND cr.collected_at <= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') ) SELECT ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(delta_req), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(delta_timed), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(delta_req), 0), 0) AS NUMERIC), 2) AS value, COALESCE(SUM(delta_req), 0) AS requestedcount, COALESCE(SUM(delta_timed), 0) AS timedcount FROM checkpoint_delta WHERE delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0

WITH checkpoint_with_delta AS ( SELECT cr.collected_at, cr.checkpoint_write_time, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoint_write_time) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0.0 ELSE GREATEST(cr.checkpoint_write_time - LAG(cr.checkpoint_write_time) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at), 0) / 1000.0 END AS delta_write_time, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_timed - LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_timed, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_req - LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_req FROM checkpoint_raw cr WHERE cr.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND cr.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND cr.collected_at <= #{endTime} ), time_bucketed AS ( SELECT
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) - INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int % 5) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int / 30 * 30) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) AS time_bucket
, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN AVG(CASE WHEN delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0 THEN delta_write_time ELSE NULL END) * 1000.0 ELSE 0.0 END AS avg_write_time FROM checkpoint_with_delta GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket ) SELECT TO_CHAR(time_bucket AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(avg_write_time, 0.0) AS avg_write_time FROM time_bucketed ORDER BY time_bucket

WITH checkpoint_with_delta AS ( SELECT cr.collected_at, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_timed - LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_timed, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_req - LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_req FROM checkpoint_raw cr WHERE cr.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND cr.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND cr.collected_at <= #{endTime} ), time_bucketed AS ( SELECT
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) - INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int % 5) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int / 30 * 30) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) AS time_bucket
, SUM(GREATEST(delta_timed, 0)) AS timed, SUM(GREATEST(delta_req, 0)) AS requested FROM checkpoint_with_delta GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket ) SELECT TO_CHAR(time_bucket AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(requested, 0) AS requested, COALESCE(timed, 0) AS timed FROM time_bucketed ORDER BY time_bucket

WITH wal_with_delta AS ( SELECT cr.collected_at, cr.wal_bytes, -- 이전 값과의 차이 계산 (delta) CASE WHEN LAG(cr.wal_bytes) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(cr.wal_bytes - LAG(cr.wal_bytes) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at), 0) END AS delta_wal_bytes FROM checkpoint_raw cr WHERE cr.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND cr.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND cr.collected_at <= #{endTime} ), time_bucketed AS ( SELECT
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) - INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int % 5) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int / 30 * 30) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) AS time_bucket
, SUM(delta_wal_bytes) AS wal_bytes FROM wal_with_delta GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket ) SELECT TO_CHAR(time_bucket AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(wal_bytes, 0) AS wal_bytes FROM time_bucketed ORDER BY time_bucket

WITH checkpoint_with_delta AS ( SELECT cr.collected_at, cr.checkpoint_write_time, cr.checkpoint_sync_time, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoint_write_time) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0.0 ELSE GREATEST(cr.checkpoint_write_time - LAG(cr.checkpoint_write_time) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at), 0) / 1000.0 END AS delta_write_time, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoint_sync_time) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0.0 ELSE GREATEST(cr.checkpoint_sync_time - LAG(cr.checkpoint_sync_time) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at), 0) / 1000.0 END AS delta_sync_time, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_timed - LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_timed, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_req - LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_req FROM checkpoint_raw cr WHERE cr.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND cr.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND cr.collected_at <= #{endTime} ), time_bucketed AS ( SELECT
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) - INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int % 5) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int / 30 * 30) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) AS time_bucket
, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN AVG(CASE WHEN delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0 THEN delta_write_time ELSE NULL END) * 1000.0 ELSE 0.0 END AS write_time, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN AVG(CASE WHEN delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0 THEN delta_sync_time ELSE NULL END) * 1000.0 ELSE 0.0 END AS sync_time FROM checkpoint_with_delta GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket ) SELECT TO_CHAR(time_bucket AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(sync_time, 0.0) AS sync_time, COALESCE(write_time, 0.0) AS write_time FROM time_bucketed ORDER BY time_bucket

WITH checkpoint_with_delta AS ( SELECT cr.collected_at, cr.buffers_checkpoint, cr.checkpoint_write_time, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.buffers_checkpoint) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(cr.buffers_checkpoint - LAG(cr.buffers_checkpoint) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at), 0) END AS delta_buffers, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoint_write_time) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0.0 ELSE GREATEST(cr.checkpoint_write_time - LAG(cr.checkpoint_write_time) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at), 0) / 1000.0 END AS delta_write_time, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_timed - LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_timed, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_req - LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_req FROM checkpoint_raw cr WHERE cr.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND cr.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND cr.collected_at <= #{endTime} ), time_bucketed AS ( SELECT
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) - INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int % 5) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int / 30 * 30) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) AS time_bucket
, SUM(GREATEST(delta_buffers, 0)) AS total_delta_buffers, SUM(CASE WHEN delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0 THEN GREATEST(delta_write_time, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_delta_time FROM checkpoint_with_delta GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket ) SELECT TO_CHAR(time_bucket AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, CASE WHEN total_delta_time > 0 THEN ROUND(CAST(total_delta_buffers / total_delta_time AS NUMERIC), 2) ELSE 0.0 END AS buffers_per_sec FROM time_bucketed ORDER BY time_bucket

WITH checkpoint_with_interval AS ( SELECT cr.collected_at, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_timed - LAG(cr.checkpoints_timed) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_timed, CASE WHEN LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cr.checkpoints_req - LAG(cr.checkpoints_req) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at) END AS delta_req, COALESCE( EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cr.collected_at - LAG(cr.collected_at) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.instance_id ORDER BY cr.collected_at))) / 60.0, 0.0 ) AS interval_minutes FROM checkpoint_raw cr WHERE cr.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND cr.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND cr.collected_at <= #{endTime} ), time_bucketed AS ( SELECT
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('minute', collected_at) - INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int % 5) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '1 minute' * (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM collected_at)::int / 30 * 30) AS time_bucket
date_trunc('hour', collected_at) AS time_bucket
, AVG(CASE WHEN delta_timed > 0 OR delta_req > 0 THEN interval_minutes ELSE NULL END) AS interval_minutes FROM checkpoint_with_interval GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket ) SELECT TO_CHAR(time_bucket AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(interval_minutes, 0.0) AS interval_minutes FROM time_bucketed ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_buffers_checkpoint), 0) AS buffersWritten, COALESCE(AVG(avg_total_time), 0.0) AS avgTotalProcessTime, COALESCE(AVG(total_wal_bytes / 1048576.0), 0.0) AS checkpointDistance, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(collected_at) - MIN(collected_at))) / NULLIF(60.0 * (COUNT(*) - 1), 0) ELSE 0.0 END AS checkpointInterval, CASE WHEN AVG(avg_total_time) > 0 THEN AVG(total_wal_bytes / NULLIF(avg_total_time, 0) / 1048576.0) ELSE 0.0 END AS avgWalGenerationSpeed FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND collected_at <= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')
SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id

SELECT checkpoint_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, created_at, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{checkpointType}, #{checkpointsTimed}, #{checkpointsReq}, #{checkpointWriteTime}, #{checkpointSyncTime}, #{buffersCheckpoint}, #{walBytes}, #{walFilesAdded}, #{walFilesRemoved}, #{checkpointDistance}, #{buffersBackend}, #{avgBuffersPerSec}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO checkpoint_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgCheckpointReqRatio}, #{avgWriteTime}, #{avgSyncTime}, #{avgTotalTime}, #{totalCheckpointsTimed}, #{totalCheckpointsReq}, #{totalWalBytes}, #{totalBuffersCheckpoint}, #{status}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO checkpoint_agg_5m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgCheckpointReqRatio}, #{avgWriteTime}, #{avgSyncTime}, #{avgTotalTime}, #{totalCheckpointsTimed}, #{totalCheckpointsReq}, #{totalWalBytes}, #{totalBuffersCheckpoint}, #{status}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT checkpoint_agg_id, instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
